theme: Returning from Vacation — Catching Up with Coworker

sentences.english: Welcome back! How was your vacation?
We went to Jeju and the weather was perfect the whole time.
Did I miss anything important at work?
sentences.korean: 내가 없는 동안 중요한 거 있었어요?

sentences.english: There's a new project starting next week.
The manager wants to meet with everyone tomorrow to go over the details.
sentences.korean: 매니저가 내일 전원과 만나서 세부 사항을 검토하고 싶대요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Reporting a Lost Item at a Hotel
Returning from Vacation — Catching Up with Coworker
